## Checklist

- [ ] The project is actively maintained
- [ ] The entry follows the standardized format from [PROJECT_TEMPLATE.md](../docs/PROJECT_TEMPLATE.md)
- [ ] The entry is sorted alphabetically within its category
- [ ] Links are valid and working
